page.title: Dork Runner
page.description: Run a library of parameterized search-engine dorks against a domain, username, or email and aggregate the results.

welcomeScreen.title: Automated Dork Runner
welcomeScreen.intro: Enter a domain, username, or email above and select which dork templates to run.
welcomeScreen.description: DuckDuckGo is used by default since it's far less likely to block scripted queries than Google or Bing. Queries run one at a time with a short delay between them.

engineWarning.title: Best-effort engine
engineWarning.message: Google and Bing actively block/CAPTCHA scripted queries, often after a single request. Results from this engine may be empty even when DuckDuckGo would find something.

results.someQueriesFailed: {{count}} queries failed or returned nothing (this is expected for blocked/CAPTCHA'd engines)
